---
title: "0.2.PRIMEloci predictions processing"
author: "Hjolli"
date: "2025-01-06"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(CAGEfightR)
library(GenomicRanges)
library(readr)
library(rtracklayer)
library(parallel)
library(ggplot2)
library(GenomicFeatures)
library(TxDb.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38.knownGene)
library(SummarizedExperiment)
library(tibble)
library(ggrepel)
library(dplyr)
library(scales)
library(gridExtra)
library(BuenColors)
library(reshape2)

theme_set(theme_bw(base_size = 8))
```



```{r}
# Read in PRIMEloci cellFacet refined predictions 
# Regions with FANTOM5 pooled rmSingletons score>=0.75 retained

# Per cellFacet PRIMEloci score
PL.cellFacet.fantom5 <- read.table(
  "/projects/ralab/data/projects/nucleiCAGEproject/8.Genomewide_prediction/FANTOM5_rmSingletons_cellfacet/FANTOM5-cellfacet_score_setnoCAGEtoNaN.tsv",
  sep="\t",header=T, row.names = 1)

# Per cellFacet sum counts
expr.cellFacet.fantom5 <- read.table(
  "/projects/ralab/data/projects/nucleiCAGEproject/8.Genomewide_prediction/FANTOM5_rmSingletons_cellfacet/FANTOM5-cellfacet_sumcount.tsv",
  sep="\t",header=T, row.names = 1)

#Make into rangedSummarized experiment
ranges <- GRanges(gsub(";",":",rownames(PL.cellFacet.fantom5)))
cellFacet.rse <- SummarizedExperiment(assays=SimpleList(PL.score=PL.cellFacet.fantom5, counts=expr.cellFacet.fantom5),
                                      rowRanges=ranges,
                                      colData=DataFrame(sample=colnames(PL.cellFacet.fantom5)))

# Read in FANTOM5 predictions
F5 <- import.bed("/projects/ralab/data/projects/nucleiCAGEproject/0.External_resources/F5.hg38.enhancers.bed.gz")
```

```{r}
#Read in bigwig files for TPM normalization
plus_files <- list.files(path="/projects/ralab/data/projects/nucleiCAGEproject/0.External_resources/FANTOM5/pooled_bw",
                         pattern="*.plus.bw",
                         full.names=TRUE)
minus_files <- list.files(path="/projects/ralab/data/projects/nucleiCAGEproject/0.External_resources/FANTOM5/pooled_bw/",
                          pattern="*.minus.bw",
                          full.names=TRUE)

names <- gsub("\\.plus\\.bw$", "",plus_files) %>% basename()

bw_plus <- BigWigFileList(plus_files)
bw_minus <- BigWigFileList(minus_files)
names(bw_plus) <- names
names(bw_minus) <- names

CTSSs <- quantifyCTSSs(plusStrand=bw_plus,
                       minusStrand=bw_minus)

CTSSs <- calcTotalTags(CTSSs)

totaltags <- CTSSs$totalTags

#Fix names
names(totaltags) <- gsub("_",".",names(totaltags))
names(totaltags) <- gsub("[()]", "", gsub(" ", ".", names(totaltags)))
names(totaltags) <- gsub("[- ]", ".", names(totaltags)) # Replace spaces and hyphens with dots

colData(cellFacet.rse)$totalTags <- totaltags[colData(cellFacet.rse)$sample]

cellFacet.rse <- calcTPM(cellFacet.rse,
                         inputAssay="counts",
                         outputAssay = "TPM",
                         totalTags = "totalTags")

quantile_target_normalization <- function(mat) {
  # Get the target distribution, ignoring NA values
  target_dist <- sort(as.vector(mat), na.last = NA)
  
  # Apply quantile normalization to each column
  normalized_mat <- apply(mat, 2, function(column) {
    non_na_idx <- which(!is.na(column))
    
    if (length(non_na_idx) == 0) return(column)  # If all values are NA, return as is
    
    ranks <- rank(column[non_na_idx], ties.method = "average")
    
    scaled_ranks <- (ranks - min(ranks)) / (max(ranks) - min(ranks)) * (length(target_dist) - 1) + 1
    
    normalized_values <- approx(seq_along(target_dist), target_dist, scaled_ranks, rule = 2)$y

    # Replace the non-NA values with their normalized values
    output_column <- column
    output_column[non_na_idx] <- normalized_values  
    
    return(output_column)
  })
  
  return(normalized_mat)
}


assay(cellFacet.rse,"qn.PL.score") <- quantile_target_normalization(as.matrix(assay(cellFacet.rse,"PL.score")))

txdb <- TxDb.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38.knownGene
cellFacet.rse <- assignTxType(cellFacet.rse,txModels = txdb)

saveRDS(cellFacet.rse,file="/projects/ralab/data/projects/nucleiCAGEproject/11.LDSC_FANTOM5/ldsc_files/cellFacet.rds")
```



```{r}
#Select top distal regions and promoter proximal regions
cellFacet.rse <- readRDS("cellFacet.rds")
rowData(cellFacet.rse)$location <- NA
rowData(cellFacet.rse)$location[rowData(cellFacet.rse)$txType %in% c("promoter","proximal","fiveUTR")] <- "proximal"
rowData(cellFacet.rse)$location[rowData(cellFacet.rse)$txType %in% c("intron","intergenic")] <- "distal"
keep <- !is.na(rowData(cellFacet.rse)$location)
cellFacet.rse <- cellFacet.rse[keep,]

F5 <- assignTxType(F5, txModels=txdb)
F5$location[F5$txType %in% c("promoter","proximal","fiveUTR")] <- "proximal"
F5$location[F5$txType %in% c("intron","intergenic")] <- "distal"
```


```{r}
#Generate proximal and distal bed files
PL.proximal <- subset(rowRanges(cellFacet.rse),location=="proximal")
PL.distal <- subset(rowRanges(cellFacet.rse),location=="distal")
export.bed(PL.proximal,"/projects/ralab/data/projects/nucleiCAGEproject/0.External_resources/FANTOM5_cellFacet_bedFiles/PL_proximal.bed")
export.bed(PL.distal,"/projects/ralab/data/projects/nucleiCAGEproject/0.External_resources/FANTOM5_cellFacet_bedFiles/PL_distal.bed")

F5.proximal <- subset(F5,location=="proximal")
F5.distal <- subset(F5,location=="distal")
export.bed(F5.proximal,"/projects/ralab/data/projects/nucleiCAGEproject/0.External_resources/FANTOM5_cellFacet_bedFiles/F5_proximal.bed")
export.bed(F5.distal,"/projects/ralab/data/projects/nucleiCAGEproject/0.External_resources/FANTOM5_cellFacet_bedFiles/F5_distal.bed")

```




```{r}
# Generate per cellFacet bed file

generate_bed_files <- function(rse, assay_name, score_threshold, location_col, output_dir) {
  # Create output directory if it doesn't exist
  if (!dir.exists(output_dir)) dir.create(output_dir)
  
  # Extract assay data
  assay_data <- assays(rse)[[assay_name]]
  
  # Extract rowRanges directly
  ranges <- rowRanges(rse)
  
  # Ensure the location column exists in rowRanges metadata
  if (!(location_col %in% colnames(mcols(ranges)))) {
    stop(paste("Column", location_col, "not found in rowRanges metadata"))
  }
  
  # Loop over each sample
  sample_names <- colnames(assay_data)
  for (sample in sample_names) {
    # Filter regions with PL.score >= threshold for the current sample
    sample_scores <- assay_data[, sample]
    valid_idx <- !is.na(sample_scores) & sample_scores >= score_threshold
    valid_regions <- ranges[valid_idx]
    
    # Split regions into distal and proximal based on the location column
    split_regions <- split(valid_regions, mcols(valid_regions)[[location_col]])
    
    # Write each category to a separate BED file
    for (category in names(split_regions)) {
      category_regions <- split_regions[[category]]
      
      # Convert to BED format
      bed_data <- data.frame(
        seqnames = as.character(seqnames(category_regions)),
        start = start(category_regions),
        end = end(category_regions),
        score = sample_scores[valid_idx][mcols(valid_regions)[[location_col]] == category]
      )
      
      # Create a filename
      bed_filename <- file.path(
        output_dir, 
        paste0(sample, "_", category, "_", assay_name, score_threshold, ".bed")
      )
      
      # Write to file
      write.table(bed_data, bed_filename, quote = FALSE, sep = "\t", row.names = FALSE, col.names = FALSE)
    }
  }
}


# PL score usage
generate_bed_files(
  rse = cellFacet.rse,
  assay_name = "qn.PL.score",
  score_threshold = 0.5,
  location_col = "location",
  output_dir = "/projects/ralab/data/projects/nucleiCAGEproject/0.External_resources/FANTOM5_cellFacet_bedFiles/"
)


# TPM usage
generate_bed_files(
  rse = cellFacet.rse,
  assay_name = "TPM",
  score_threshold = 1,
  location_col = "location",
  output_dir = "/projects/ralab/data/projects/nucleiCAGEproject/0.External_resources/FANTOM5_cellFacet_bedFiles/"
)
```








```{r}
generate_bed_files_strict <- function(rse, assay_name, top_n, score_threshold = 0.5, location_col, output_dir) {
  # Create output directory if it doesn't exist
  if (!dir.exists(output_dir)) dir.create(output_dir)
  
  # Extract assay data and rowRanges
  assay_data <- assays(rse)[[assay_name]]
  ranges <- rowRanges(rse)
  
  # Ensure the location column exists in rowRanges metadata
  if (!(location_col %in% colnames(mcols(ranges)))) {
    stop(paste("Column", location_col, "not found in rowRanges metadata"))
  }
  
  # Loop over each sample
  sample_names <- colnames(assay_data)
  for (sample in sample_names) {
    # Extract scores for the current sample
    sample_scores <- assay_data[, sample]
    
    # Handle distal regions only
    distal_idx <- mcols(ranges)[[location_col]] == "distal"
    valid_distal <- ranges[distal_idx]
    valid_distal_scores <- sample_scores[distal_idx]
    
    # Combine scores and ranges into a data frame
    distal_scores_df <- data.frame(
      seqnames = as.character(seqnames(valid_distal)),
      start = start(valid_distal),
      end = end(valid_distal),
      score = valid_distal_scores
    )
    
    # Remove NA scores and filter by the threshold (≥ score_threshold)
    distal_scores_df <- distal_scores_df[!is.na(distal_scores_df$score) & 
                                           distal_scores_df$score >= score_threshold, ]
    
    # If no valid distal regions are found, print a message and skip to next sample
    if (nrow(distal_scores_df) == 0) {
      message(sprintf("No valid distal regions with score >= %.2f found for sample: %s", 
                      score_threshold, sample))
      next
    }
    
    # Order by score (descending) and keep only top_n if available
    distal_scores_df <- distal_scores_df[order(-distal_scores_df$score), ]
    if (nrow(distal_scores_df) > top_n) {
      distal_scores_df <- distal_scores_df[1:top_n, ]
    }
    
    # Write top distal regions to BED file
    distal_filename <- file.path(output_dir, paste0(sample, "_distal_", score_threshold, ".bed"))
    write.table(distal_scores_df, distal_filename, quote = FALSE, sep = "\t", 
                row.names = FALSE, col.names = FALSE)
  }
}


# Usage
generate_bed_files_strict(
  rse = cellFacet.rse,
  assay_name = "qn.PL.score",
  score_threshold = 0.5,
  top_n = 100000,
  location_col = "location",
  output_dir = "/projects/ralab/data/projects/nucleiCAGEproject/0.External_resources/FANTOM5_cellFacet_bedFiles/score_range/"
)

generate_bed_files_strict(
  rse = cellFacet.rse,
  assay_name = "qn.PL.score",
  score_threshold = 0.55,
  top_n = 100000,
  location_col = "location",
  output_dir = "/projects/ralab/data/projects/nucleiCAGEproject/0.External_resources/FANTOM5_cellFacet_bedFiles/score_range/"
)

generate_bed_files_strict(
  rse = cellFacet.rse,
  assay_name = "qn.PL.score",
  score_threshold = 0.6,
  top_n = 100000,
  location_col = "location",
  output_dir = "/projects/ralab/data/projects/nucleiCAGEproject/0.External_resources/FANTOM5_cellFacet_bedFiles/score_range/"
)

generate_bed_files_strict(
  rse = cellFacet.rse,
  assay_name = "qn.PL.score",
  score_threshold = 0.65,
  top_n = 100000,
  location_col = "location",
  output_dir = "/projects/ralab/data/projects/nucleiCAGEproject/0.External_resources/FANTOM5_cellFacet_bedFiles/score_range/"
)

generate_bed_files_strict(
  rse = cellFacet.rse,
  assay_name = "qn.PL.score",
  score_threshold = 0.7,
  top_n = 100000,
  location_col = "location",
  output_dir = "/projects/ralab/data/projects/nucleiCAGEproject/0.External_resources/FANTOM5_cellFacet_bedFiles/score_range/"
)

generate_bed_files_strict(
  rse = cellFacet.rse,
  assay_name = "qn.PL.score",
  score_threshold = 0.75,
  top_n = 100000,
  location_col = "location",
  output_dir = "/projects/ralab/data/projects/nucleiCAGEproject/0.External_resources/FANTOM5_cellFacet_bedFiles/score_range/"
)
```
